item.title: The 494th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
AAAAAwwwwWWWOOOOOOOOoooooo is a pretty cool name, not gonna lie.
UNFUN FACT: People are fucking stupid
I'm actually allergic to some of the preservatives in hot dogs.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays This week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
Got 'em
@SeveralRaccoonsInAHumanSuit
Night Time is Best Time
Me
That doesn't at all sound fun in any way.
How dare a BBQ place not have vegan options!
FUN FACT: F O R G
I'm sure this is a reference to an interview with her, but I don't care enough to look it up.
Corp Bussy Stems
root beer flavored vape juice flavored root ber
@IAmTheComet always bringing us those mentally healthy memes
Also: Narrating, Neverending, Neatening, Noting, Nutmeg, Nutting, Nottinghamg, Numbering...
The text is just shit on this one how did they fuck it up this bad?
Another great school name would be "School".
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: And how do people ever live without kitties
item.dc:creator: Toredineys

item.title: Finally a little better
item.description: Edit: you people are just too much and too awesome. Thank you all for the advice and recipes! To answer a few things though. We have hit food pantries and food drives when things got bad. But I don't feel good about taking that food from. People who are worse off than me. I try to give when I can. For everyone suggesting the @freepizzadude I appreciate it, and i do love a good pizza, but we're weren't that desperate yet if that makes sense. We weren't on the verge of starving or losing our home or anything like that. Things were stretched tight, but we were making it work. I might have skipped a meal or two, but my family didn't need to. And God bless my wife shed doneverything she could with anything we had. It just feels so much better now I won't have to worry as much. And again, you guys are so awesome! Feel free to keep sharing cheap eats recipie ---- Been surviving on 50 to 60 a week for food. Always made sure wife and kids ate, and sometimes a little treat when we could squeeze a few pennies. It's been hard with the holidays. Family gave us a turkey for Thanksgiving and I cried making it I was so grateful. Finally getting our foodstamps after a long, pointless fight for them, we can finally be food secure and lay in some basic to keep like beans, frozen veg and something besides rice and potatoes. Downvote If you want. Just yelling to the void and being grateful I can take care of my family better.
item.dc:creator: MrEon6908

item.title: Stuff my husband sends me
item.description:
Not a lesbian, but in this house, we listen and we don't judge.
Dude is a great feminist ally!
Dreams. Goals.
Adulting gets zero stars.
Life imitating art. This is our 16 year old at the Video Game History Museum
Getting this for our new house!
Creating a TED Talk about the perils of not teaching social studies with fidelity anymore. This bolsters my argument!
He was schooling our 19 year old on "Good music"
Correlation does not equal causation.
Because I have ADHD
Thanks 2024!!
item.dc:creator: LadyMacDeath

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
about damn time
cool swan though
mmm hmm
justifiable
pasta good
Uncle John's Bathroom Reader series was fire
all hail
you know where that leads...
no need to brag
clever
i only use a weed vaporizer if i need to be more discreet
i love all of you
same thing
that's the main place i do them
as is tradition
finally
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Fix C6H Error Instant Pot. Bad Pressure Sensor Switch
item.description:
Flashing Lights and Weird Beep Tones. Uh Oh!
C6H is a faulty Pressure Sensor Switch
Here's what's inside the base. Easy to access.
This is the pressure sensor switch. Remove one Phillips screw in between the two metal switches.
Pull the two separate big wires.. (yours may be Red). And the single black connector with two thin wires in it. All just pull off without tools. Easy.
This is what it looks like after removing the part. Replacement part is $8 on Amazon.
item.dc:creator: jiarby

item.title: Independent truffle dog don’t need no human to pay the bills
item.description:
Eisley is a 3 year old Czechoslovakian Vlciak (a purebred dog from Slovakia) who is about as multipurpose a working dog as one could ask. She finds truffles, is a show dog, does sports like FastCAT, NASDA, AKC scent work, is working on becoming a therapy dog, manages birds on piers to keep them clean, and is just the best friend a girl could ask for. I adore her.
This breed has a thin margin of error and people get them just for their looks (and often to pretend it’s not their fault they never trained their dog) so it’s so great to get Eisley out and show people how wonderful these working dogs can be! This was about 6 weeks of training condensed into a minute.
She loves to work even when I try and get her to leave because I am just a big saggy bag of water sloshing through the woods ?
And a very cheap employee to boot!
Truffle tax! This was about 2 hours of work.
item.dc:creator: aviculae

item.title: Elf Hexia
item.description: TIS THE SEASON!!! Hope your week ended off well!!! Just a few more sleeps til Christmas yayyy! I’m visiting family, but I’m excited! Have any of you got New Year’s resolutions planned? I decided to start mine early and quit refined sugar and delete a couple of social media apps on my phone so I can focus more. Bit random but yeah! As usual the spicy stuff is here: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Truth in pictures
item.description: Lost my boy Otis in July...trying to be kinder to myself this holiday season
item.dc:creator: GullahGullahIslander

item.title: I got to explore Mongolia this year. I photographed all the fascinating people I came across and the endless bands of horses everywhere...
item.description:
A teenage girl in traditional garb.
I really wasn't prepared for just how many bands of feral horses run around everywhere. They are "domesticated" in the sense that they have some owners, but many of them still are allowed to run free in the wild & fend for themselves. Since each band has their own territory if their owner wants to find them they explore their range to find them again.
A lovely biker girl at the motorcycle rally in Ulaanbaatar all glammed up, I asked if I can take her photograph. She posed for me on her motorcycle.
I was hoping to see the iconic eagle wranglers and was lucky enough to run into one on my 2nd day outside the Capitol. If you visit the monument to Chinggis Khan he might be there.
Walking across the city square in Ulaanbaatar and I came across these skater kids. I just asked if I could take their photograph, and they posed like that on their own. Skaters are so effortlessly cool.
Horsemen of the steppe
Spotted this handsome man in the capitol who just graduated as an officer from Firefighter School
Came across this lovely flooded river prairie where a large herd of horses were running through the water.
A suave modern man walks in front of the gates of the old Gandantegchinlen Monastery.
A trio of women sit in the city square fascinated with something thats piqued their interest...
Exploring a valley in central Mongolia and there were horses grazing on the other side of the river. I just stood there observing them and then captured this moment
Randomly stumbled across a lovely wedding party all dressed up. Beautiful bride and groom celebrating their joyful day.
Biker boy about to ride out
If they are not on horses they are on motorcycles
Central Mongolia.
This incredible lady made me feel like I was in a movie. When I walked into the jazz club she was singing so eloquently up on stage. Her song ends, approaches my travel buddy & I & welcomes us to the venue. I notice she had an alluring tattoo of a falcon on the back of her neck. We get to talking about her jazz band, the music scene here, & her career as a singer. She's so lovely & talented. I couldn't help but be so charmed & impressed!
Youd be forgiven how much horses abound in Mongolia to mistake these to be similar like all the rest. These are in fact the rarest horses in the world. The Przewalski's horse went extinct in the wild in 1960. Conservation efforts since have reintroduced them into the wild in China, Kazakhstan, and in Mongolia. Their numbers have risen from 0 to nearly 2,500 in the last 64 years. Hustai National Park is a protected wildlife area where they live. They are among the last true wild horses in the world. Not even the notable Mongolian horselords have ever been able to tame them.
These ger homes, traditionally made with wool and felt and supported by wood are easy to put up and take down when on the move. Some have taken to use modern materials as well. Gers dot the landscape everywhere here. I imagine one would have to be a miserable failure to be homeless in Mongolia when they have been living in these mobile for millennia.
26.5-meter-high statue of Avalokiteśvara.
I want to thank the horse for also posing very naturally
A Firefighter Academy graduate poses in front of the Parliament Building and Chinggis Khan
Waited for the moment the setting sun shone through the gates of Karakorum
The statue of Chinggis Khan, claimed to be the largest equestrian statue in the world
Karakorum, the ancient capitol of the Mongol Empire, a Buddhist temple was built on top of its ruins
Central Mongolia
The Semi Gobi
Camels of the semi gobi
Ulaanbaatar at night
People watching along the streets and traffic is moving at a snails pace in the capitol. A cute moment of a mother and son waiting for their bus to keep moving.
A Mongolian woman demonstrates how they bless the caravan with mares milk.
Monks in the morning
Herding the horses
Buddhist Temple atop Gorkhi Terelj National Park
Mountains of Gorkhi Terelj National Park
Showing love to her favorite horse
item.dc:creator: WildYucatanMan

item.title: Forest officer taking a lost baby elephant back to his family
item.dc:creator: CloisteredExtredie

item.title: It was an emotional experience
item.description:
recording of the live stream https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d_LNSbStu9c
recording of the live stream https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d_LNSbStu9c Transcript of first few couple of minutes ========== welcome to Antarctica so great to see everybody uhsuper excited that we're live streaming from Antarctica but more importantly it is midnight where we are at right outside of Union Glacier and so the question is obviously everyone can see that it is super bright behind me so the question is the sun still up at midnight or is this a coffee cup costic or a reflection off the Dome so before I give you the answer I want to tell everybody about today today was a very emotional day for me this is something I've been working on for over a year and when I woke up this morning I knew today was finally the day that we were going to fly to Antarctica and it's been a year of overcoming adversity uh just having people tell me things that we weren't going to be able to do and just trying to make it happen so I've been thinking through all of the things that I was told uh over the last year and you know the first one I think was that uh we would not actually go to Antarctica and and here we are in Antarctica uh some people tried to say that uh whatever we were going to do in December was already filmed somewhere else in the world and this will just be a recording so I will go ahead and uh interact with your comments I'm going to do my best with these glasses on I I can't remove them the the snow blindness is very very real it is very very white out here uh M2M uh daylight uh you just saw your comment thanks for all your support this last year on X uh but anyway yeah if you have thoughts you want to share or questions just go ahead and put them into the chat and I will interact with you to just show that this is live so I was told we wouldn't make it to Antarctica here we are uh I was told that uh the trip would be cancelled and uh it was not cancelled I was told that uh we would only be able to go to the coast of Antarctica we wouldn't be able to go to the interior we wouldn't be able to go to right at 80° South which is where we were planning on going and here we are in the interior hopefully you see the the GPS tracking units on our website showing where we're at uh I was told that we could only take a boat to Antarctica not a plane and we flew on a 757 today to get here I was told that uh if we did make it this far we wouldn't be able to have any internet and here we are uh utilizing starlink satellite internet to live stream uh I was told that uh no flat earthers would go and we got two of the biggest flat earthers jeren and Austin to join us uh once they agreed to go I was told that uh anybody who's a big name in Flat Earth is just a shill and they're not real and you'd have to get somebody that nobody knows is flat earther if you really want this to be the real deal and then we got leas Beth uh to join us and uh not not a lot of people knew about her she didn't have a a big presence like uh some of the other people some of the other people do so anyway it's just been a year of just being told you can't and you won't and uh we're just you know coming through and and making this happen uh I was also told that if we somehow did make it here that NASA would make fake clouds to cover the sky so that we couldn't see the Sun and as you can see blue skies almost not a cloud in the sky really
item.dc:creator: psuedon
